# `unsubscribe_from_docket_alert`

**Unsubscribe from Docket Alert**

- **Source:** `courtlistener/mcp/tools/unsubscribe_from_docket_alert_tool.py`
- **Estimated definition size:** ~194 tokens (description ~59, input schema ~45; cl100k_base)
- **Parameters:** 1 (1 required)
- **Raw input schema:** [`unsubscribe_from_docket_alert.inputs.json`](./unsubscribe_from_docket_alert.inputs.json)

## Description

Unsubscribe from alerts for a docket on CourtListener.

Looks up the alert by docket ID and deletes it, so you only need
the docket ID (not the alert ID).

Use `call_endpoint` with endpoint_id "docket-alerts" to list
existing subscriptions.

## Annotations

| Annotation | Value |
|---|---|
| `title` | `"Unsubscribe from Docket Alert"` |
| `readOnlyHint` | `false` |
| `destructiveHint` | `true` |
| `idempotentHint` | `true` |
| `openWorldHint` | `true` |

## Parameters

### `docket`

integer · **required**

The docket ID to unsubscribe from.
